overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving on an elevated futuristic highway through a dense cyberpunk city. The scene features heavy traffic, towering skyscrapers with neon accents, large digital billboards, and multi-level highway infrastructure under clear midday skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: cruising at steady speed through moderate traffic on the elevated highway

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying anime characters and JUST DREAM text in pink neon
multi-level highway overpass structure with green structural elements
tall futuristic buildings with glass facades and red neon vertical accents

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a wide elevated highway through a futuristic cityscape. A large digital billboard displaying anime-style characters dominates the right side while towering skyscrapers rise in the background. Traffic flows steadily in multiple lanes under the clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway section with red safety lane and metal fencing

events.description: vehicle changes lanes to the right toward the red paved shoulder area

agents.ego_description: steering right onto the red-marked lane alongside the security fence

notable_agents.action: black sedan maintaining parallel position in the right lane

entered.detail: tall metal security fence with horizontal bars running along the highway edge
distinctive red painted lane marking on the highway shoulder
large advertisement displaying BOTTLE IS UP text with portrait imagery

segments.scene_description: The vehicle moves right onto a curved section of highway marked with red pavement and bordered by a tall metal security fence. The camera angle shifts to reveal more of the city skyline on the left while passing the digital billboard. Traffic continues to flow alongside as the highway curves gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with overhead structural coverage

events.description: passing under the lower overpass into a more enclosed highway section with multiple overhead levels

agents.ego_description: navigating through the covered highway section beneath multiple overpass levels

entered.detail: concrete underside of the highway overpass with green trim and lighting fixtures
directional traffic signs mounted on the overpass structure above

segments.scene_description: The highway enters a more enclosed section beneath multiple levels of overpass infrastructure. The lighting becomes slightly diffused under the concrete structures overhead. Various vehicles navigate the multi-level interchange while the city skyline remains visible through the gaps between structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated highway with commercial billboards and city skyline

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway past various advertisements and skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: yellow truck visible in the left lane overtaking the ego vehicle

entered.detail: large advertisement displaying REAL WATER text with male portrait
concrete barrier along the right edge of the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The highway opens up again to full sky visibility as the vehicle continues past commercial billboards including one for REAL WATER. The skyscrapers loom closer on the left while the vehicle passes under additional overhead signs. Traffic maintains a steady flow along the elevated roadway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated futuristic highway that transitions from an open, sunlit cityscape into a dense network of overpasses before emerging back into the open air. It begins with the vehicle traveling past a massive anime-style digital billboard and towering skyscrapers under a clear midday sun. As the highway curves right onto red pavement bordered by metal security fences, the camera shifts to reveal a wider expanse of the city skyline. The scene then moves into a more enclosed environment beneath multiple levels of concrete overpass infrastructure, where the lighting becomes diffused and the skyline is only visible through gaps in the overhead structures. Finally, the roadway opens up again to full sky visibility, passing commercial signs for real water and looming skyscrapers as the vehicle continues its steady flow through the urban landscape.
